note: Life-jacket / personal flotation device (PFD) loaner-board locations along the American River Parkway and nearby Sacramento parks, from the Sacramento County Regional Parks 'Kids Don't Float' water-safety program. Free to borrow on site; each board typically stocks 8-12 vests. Coordinates are approximate (access-point locations). Verify seasonal availability with the program.
program_name: Sacramento County Regional Parks — Kids Don't Float

sites.name: Discovery Park
sites.note: Two loaner boards at the confluence park.

sites.name: El Manto Access
sites.note: River access at the end of El Manto Dr (Gold River).

sites.name: Sand Cove Park
sites.note: City of Sacramento park on the Sacramento River.
